hero.title: Interactive Learning
hero.description: Artemis brings interactive learning to life with instant, individual feedback on programming exercises, quizzes, modeling tasks, and more. Offering customization for instructors and real-time collaboration for students, this platform bridges creativity and education. Embrace a new era of engaging, adaptive learning with Artemis, where innovation meets inclusivity.
hero.subtitle: Artemis is open-source. Meet the future of educational excellence.
hero.usedBy: Trusted by Premier Academic Institutions and Educators

ai.title: AI That Supports Learning And Teaching
ai.description:
Artemis integrates AI across the teaching workflow —
from lecture-aware tutoring and competency guidance to assessment support and exercise creation.

assessment.title: Exercises And Exams For Real Courses
assessment.description: From programming exercises with built-in CI to secure online exams, Artemis supports the core exercise and exam workflows of technical courses.

platform.title: Course Delivery, Integrity, And Operations
platform.description: Artemis goes beyond assignments with integrated lectures, communication, tutorial workflows, integrity tooling, and learning analytics.

summary.heading: One platform for teaching, assessment, and academic integrity
summary.description: Artemis combines AI-assisted learning, scalable assessment workflows, integrated teaching tools, and course operations in a single system for modern technical education.

ai.title: AI
ai.description: Personalized guidance, competency tracking, automated assessment support, and exercise generation.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.description: From programming and quiz exercises to modeling, text, and secure online exams.

teaching.title: Teaching
teaching.description: Lecture content, communication, and guided support throughout the course.

platform.title: Platform
platform.description: Integrity, scale, and open infrastructure for running large technical courses.

ai.title: AI that reaches lectures, tutors, and long-running courses
ai.description: Artemis AI is embedded across daily teaching workflows, not just isolated chat windows.

tutorSuggestions.title: Tutor Suggestions
tutorSuggestions.description: Iris can suggest answers for tutors responding to student questions in the communication module.

lectureAwareAi.title: Lecture-Aware AI
lectureAwareAi.description: Processed lecture units and transcriptions give AI assistants grounded access to actual course material.

persistentContext.title: Persistent Context
persistentContext.description: Long-term memory and conversation continuity make follow-up guidance more personalized over time.

assessment.title: More than one kind of coursework
assessment.description: Artemis supports collaborative, open-ended, and grading-heavy workflows beyond the core exercise types.

teamExercises.title: Team Exercises
teamExercises.description: Run team-based assignments with real-time collaboration and dedicated tutors per team.

fileUpload.title: File Upload Exercises
fileUpload.description: Accept documents, images, and other files when the right exercise format is not code or quiz based.

grading.title: Assessment & Grading
grading.description: Double-blind grading, assessment training, complaints, grade keys, exports, and bonus handling support real assessment operations.

platform.title: Teaching operations beyond individual exercises
platform.description: Artemis also covers course administration, LMS integration, and the infrastructure needed for large courses.

tutorialGroups.title: Tutorial Groups
tutorialGroups.description: Plan sessions, manage registrations, assign tutors, track attendance, and connect tutorial groups to communication channels.

lti.title: LTI Integration
lti.description: Integrate Artemis into existing LMS setups through LTI for platforms such as Moodle and edX.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Use and extend an open-source platform backed by an active academic development community.

scalable.title: Scalable Infrastructure
scalable.description: Run large technical courses with integrated build agents and infrastructure designed for thousands of students.

iris.title: Your Personal AI Tutor
iris.description: Iris answers questions about exercises, lectures, and learning progress with context-aware guidance that helps students move forward without short-circuiting the learning process.

bullets.0: Support for programming exercises, lectures, and course content
bullets.1: Proactive guidance when feedback signals that a student is stuck
bullets.2: Persistent conversations and personalized follow-up across sessions

atlas.title: Adaptive Learning Paths
atlas.description: Competency-based learning paths connect lectures, exercises, and learning objectives so students and instructors can see progress clearly.

bullets.0: Track competencies linked to lecture units and exercises
bullets.1: Visual dashboards for students and instructors
bullets.2: Recommendations and analytics based on individual progress

athena.title: AI-Powered Assessment
athena.description: AI-assisted assessment workflows help instructors review text, modeling, and programming submissions with faster, more consistent feedback.

bullets.0: Feedback suggestions across text, modeling, and programming workflows
bullets.1: Consistency support for large assessment teams
bullets.2: Learns from instructor corrections and grading patterns

hyperion.title: AI Exercise Generation
hyperion.description: Hyperion helps instructors create, refine, and sanity-check new exercises so ideas become high-quality course material faster.

bullets.0: Create programming exercises from natural language descriptions
bullets.1: Suggest tests, solutions, and supporting material
bullets.2: Refine drafts with consistency checks and instructor feedback

programming.title: Programming Exercises
programming.description: Artemis combines built-in version control, CI, online editing, and secure build agents into one workflow for scalable programming education.

bullets.0: Students can work locally or directly in the browser
bullets.1: Instant feedback through tests, static analysis, hints, and hidden tests
bullets.2: Supports many programming languages with integrated Git and CI

platform.title: Integrated Git & CI
platform.description: Starter, solution, and student repositories plus automated builds are provisioned directly inside Artemis.

workflow.title: Browser And Local IDE Workflow
workflow.description: Students can switch between the online editor and their local setup while instructors review code directly in the browser.

secure.title: Secure Build Agents
secure.description: Build agents run tests and static analysis in isolated environments designed for scalable course operation.

programming.programmingLanguages: Works with all programming languages, such as

quiz.title: Quiz Exercises
quiz.description: Quiz exercises cover live teaching, practice, and exams with multiple formats and instant grading.

bullets.0: Multiple-choice, drag-and-drop, short-answer, and modeling quiz questions
bullets.1: Live, practice, and exam modes for different teaching moments
bullets.2: Automatic grading with configurable scoring and participation tracking

modeling.title: Modeling & Text Exercises
modeling.description: Modeling and text exercises combine structured diagram work, free-form writing, and AI-assisted assessment in one platform.

bullets.0: UML and other diagram types with visual feedback and element-level review
bullets.1: Text submissions with NLP-assisted feedback suggestions and language detection
bullets.2: Semi-automatic assessment improves with instructor corrections

modeling.title: Modeling Exercises
modeling.description: Create UML and other diagrams with drag and drop, multiple diagram types, and feedback directly on model elements.

text.title: Text Exercises
text.description: Assess free-text answers with structured criteria, segment-level feedback, NLP assistance, and language-aware support.

exams.title: Comprehensive Exam Mode
exams.description: Run secure online exams with variants, grading workflows, suspicious-behavior monitoring, and integrated review.

bullets.0: Exercise groups and variants reduce copying during real exams
bullets.1: Integrated plagiarism checks, suspicious-behavior analysis, and test runs
bullets.2: Statistics, review windows, and correction workflows stay in one system

statistics.title: Statistics & Review
statistics.description: Track outcomes, difficulty, and review readiness with detailed exam statistics and structured student review workflows.
statistics.usingMetrics: Review the students' performance using various metrics such as average, median, and standard deviation.
statistics.studentFeedback: Review the students' perceived difficulty of every exercise to improve exams in the future.

integrity.title: Integrity Monitoring
integrity.description: Investigate suspicious sessions, plagiarism, and other anomalies from the exam checklist and dedicated monitoring dashboards.

lectures.title: Lecture Integration
lectures.description: Deliver lectures as structured units with slides, recordings, competencies, and AI-ready course content.

bullets.0: Combine slides, videos, recordings, and linked exercises in one lecture flow
bullets.1: Map lecture units to competencies and learning objectives
bullets.2: Process lecture content for transcription and AI-grounded assistance

delivery.title: Structured Lecture Delivery
delivery.description: Organize lectures into units, embed recordings, link exercises, and connect everything to competencies and course objectives.

transcription.title: Transcription And AI Grounding
transcription.description: Process lecture videos and units so Artemis can transcribe content and make it usable for lecture-aware AI support.

communication.title: Real-Time Communication
communication.description: Announcements, course channels, private messages, and notifications keep students, tutors, and instructors aligned.

bullets.0: Dedicated channels for lectures, exercises, tutorial groups, and exams
bullets.1: Announcements with web and email notifications
bullets.2: Private messages, reactions, mentions, and mobile-friendly communication

integrity.title: Academic Integrity & Learning Analytics
integrity.description: Protect academic standards and understand course progress with plagiarism checks, analytics dashboards, and operational insight.

bullets.0: Integrated JPlag-based plagiarism detection for code, text, and modeling
bullets.1: Dashboards for performance, engagement, and competency progress
bullets.2: Exportable data and course-wide signals for improving teaching decisions

plagiarism.title: Plagiarism Detection
plagiarism.description: Compare submissions side by side and manage plagiarism cases across courses and exams with integrated JPlag-based detection.

analytics.title: Learning Analytics
analytics.description: Use exercise, competency, and course-wide dashboards to understand engagement, progress, and performance trends.

cta.title: Empower Your Courses
cta.subtitle: Transform your teaching and enrich student experience with Artemis today.
